items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Bayern eye Tottenham's Archie Gray
items.summary: Tottenham Hotspur midfielder Archie Gray is being considered for a summer move by Bayern Munich and Liverpool. Transfer Talk has the latest.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Djokovic withdraws from Madrid Open with injury
items.summary: Novak Djokovic, who hasn't competed since the BNP Paribas Open in Indian Wells, has pulled out of the Madrid Open because of a lingering shoulder injury.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
